description_long: This radiator features a series of evenly spaced vertical columns, each with a rounded profile, forming a compact and symmetrical unit. The main body is a light beige or off-white color, with the lower ends of the columns capped in a darker, metallic tone, likely indicating pipe connections or mounting hardware. The radiator is mounted flush against a flat, rectangular backing panel, suggesting a wall-mounted installation. The side views reveal the radiator's slim depth, emphasizing its space-saving design. There are no visible control valves or adjustment knobs on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and streamlined appearance. The overall finish is smooth and hard, with a subtle matte sheen.
description: A slim, wall-mounted radiator with vertical columns in a light beige color and metallic end caps, featuring a minimalist and smooth design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical columns, metallic end caps, and the full width of the radiator against its backing panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's slim profile and how it projects minimally from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view showing the flat backing panel with no visible features or protrusions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thin depth and wall-mounted nature of the radiator.
attribute_pipe_connections: multiple connections at the bottom center, oriented downward
